hooks.command: CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE 'rm\s+-rf\s+/|DROP\s+TABLE|curl.*\|\s*sh|wget.*\|\s*sh' && echo 'Blocked destructive command' >&2 && exit 2 || true
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

hooks.prompt: Re-read CLAUDE.md and docs/SPRINT.md (if it exists) to restore project context after compaction.

statusLine.command: printf '%s | %s tasks' "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'no-git')" "$(grep -c '\- \[ \]' docs/TODO.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
